Title: Absolutely worth the money!

So basically I got this earphones from amazon for just 732rs! I was super happy to get Sennheiser for such an amount!

The skull candy ones are too expensive for a college student and coming to jbl, I have really bad experience with it.

The Sennheiser CX 180 Street | earphones has a built in capability of delivering a powerful bass - driven sound.

Coming to the comfort, it has finger contoured housing design that makes it easy to adjust and the appearance also looks fabulous!

It has a perfect ear-canal phone design which ensures that the ambient noise does not interrupt your listening experience!

On a further note, The Sennheiser CX 180 earphones is equipped with an impedance of 16 ohms, a frequency response in the range of 20Hz - 20, 000Hz and a sound pressure level of 110db.

Adding more, this product comes with a 2 Year Warranty.

This is a treat for people like us to get Sennheiser for such a low price, 2 year warranty and a sound quality to die for!

I would recommend you to surely go ahead with this one! You definitely wouldn't regret your decision of buying Sennheiser CX 180 Street | .

I oredered these 'Senheiser CX180' in ear headsets from flipkart for Rs. 819 and these worth the price! When talking about the build quality, the wire diameter is little bit thin, but when I used it for a couple of months and must say its made of rubber of durable quality feels flimsy wire but it will last a long if used carefully. The ear buds you get are of three different sizes i.e. Small, medium & large size. Which prevent the background noise and so the ambient noise will not interrupt in your listening experience. And choose whichever fits comfortably in your ears. In this earphones, you do not get any mic, may be it will be a deal breaker for some users i.e. This is the con of these earphones. In terms of looks, these feel rich and quiet good when wear in ear. So in terms of you do not have to compromise. When it comes to the sound quality of this headphones they deliver crystal clear sound with adequate bass and vocals are also good. The bass is adequate i.e. Its not so high and not so low so that you can experience a complete combination of clear sound, bass, good vocals and the treble is also very good enough. These earphones have the 9mm drivers which are best in class. It has that powerful bass driven stereo sound that feels so good and rich and makes the music listening experience fabulous! The frequency response is good enough. The ergonomic design makes it look better than other earphones. These are light weight and easy to carry in yout pocket wherever you go!

These earphones come with 2 years warranty so you don't have to worry about. If you are a user which demands altogether a good bass driven audio sound, these earphones are made for you carry these best companions. You can also get these at Rs. 699 at a discount price on amazon.in please compare the price it always changes. Buy it from where its being sold cheap but bware of the duplicate quality check carefully before buying.

Title: Probably the best in this range. Sennheiser.
Comment: Hello everyone.I bought this earphone a year ago and I'm still using it. I would love to share my personal experience of the product.Sound quality: the sound quality is just great. Some people complain that the base is not good enough. I would like to let everyone know that to get the best sound of any earphone you have to subject it to atleast 100 hours of use ( called the burning period) . After this you get the best possible sound from the earphones. Fit: we get 3 options of earbuds to choose from. No matter how big or small your ear holes are I am sure that one of these will fit you perfectly.i even go for jogging wearing these and they stay put Nois cancelling: even though this earphone does not cost as much it offers unbelievable noise cancellation. So much that I advice all users to not use it when on road or doing anything else that needs your complete attention. It could be dangerous. Warranty and customer service: sennheiser offers 2 years warranty with this product. Yes. Two years. I have claimed the warranty once. It is pretty easy to do so. Just Google the nearest sennheiser store to your place and send the product to them. Along with the bill of course. They will check if the damage done fits their terms and conditions for the warranty to be valid and will act accordingly. They will send a new pair of earphones to your address and all this will not take more than a week. I got mine replaced within a week as the customer service was outstanding.Like I said before this is probably the best pair of earphones that you can get within 1000 rupees. I have no regrets on buying this and it has given me 100% satisfaction. If you are looking for a brand new pair of earphones I strongly recommend this.Thank you for reading.

It is 3 months since I am using this earphones, it is a fragile piece of material for rough use. The wire has got lesser protection in terms of thickness. And the rubber muffs easily remove when inserted in ears.

It is said that the quality of hearing is the best. I have to accept this fact.

It has good looks. But the problem is with the mic, which is not there and so while attending calls, one has to hold the phone in hand. Or secondly disconnect the headphones. The value of headphones for money is not valuable. The price at which I bought the headphones, at the same price I could buy a Sony earphones, which are far better in its quality.

Title: A real badass ...
Comment:
I found these earphones on paytm and have been using it for about a month now so its best time to review now.

Build quality:

1 - Build feels sturdy of the buds but the wire kind of feels fragile as it is not braided or not even tangle free.

2 - Looks of the earphone is top notch and feels like premium ones so no complaints of the looks.

3 - They provide different sized buds so whichever fits you best just put it on to get maximum noise cancillation from outside.

4 - sound bleed is also very minimal if the buds fit completely then it is fully isolated from outside world.

5 - 3.5mm jack is gold plated and is bent neck design is good.

Performance :

1 - Sound quality is amazing for this price bracket.

2 - Bass is also solid in this earphone as seeing its compact size.

Value for money :

I think it is value for money as you are getting a amazing sound output along with great bass and that too in a solid premium design which makes you stand out in the crowd. Only thing you may miss is the inline microphone but the sound quality makes up for that. Those who want pure sound and great music experience on the go or anywhere should defenitly go for this product and it is available for about 900rupees on normal days and as less as 700rupees on some sale.

My experience :

I saw this earphone on the e-commerce website and it was well rated on the platform so I decided to buy it because they have good return policy so I bought it and when it came I quickly got to it and started testing wether I got a good one or not and I was surprised to know that the sound output was amazing and I loved it. I may not match up to some big headphones that comes in the price of about 1000rs to 1500 but it defenitely beat the every earphone I had previously used.

Title: Sennheiser CX 180 Street is Nice headphone
Comment:
Sennheiser CX 180 Street is Nice headphone, this performance is superb, and warranty is year and this is nice satisfaction tention free usage, no huge cost for this product this is a nice headphone my favourite headphone Sennheiser CX 180 Street.

I unboxed it and connected it to my Asus Zenfone 2 Laser running Lineage OS(custom rom) with Dolby Atmos audio equalizer. Oh man! Was I in for a surprise! The audio quality was really good! Better than I had expected from a 729 Rs pair of headphones. Initially the Highs were a bit too much for my liking but after tweaking the equalizer for a bit I was able to get an awesome experience. I've used it extensively for hours straight and it was really comfortable.

Build Quality: I'd give it a 3.5/5 for now, maybe its me, It seemed a bit fragile to me, not flimsy just feels like I have to be careful with it but anyway time will tell, I'll update this review after a week of usage.

Audio quality: I'd give it 4/5 because I have heard better audio quality but at a higher price range so if we are considering audio quality to the price you're paying for it, then my rating is going to be 5/5, you can't do anything better than this at this price range.

Mic wasn't important for me so it isn't a gripe for me but there are those of you for whom it is mandatory.

I've read in forums that Sennheiser Service Centers are really awesome, so that is great to know.

That sum's up my user experience of the product.

Stay tuned for more updates on the long term usage.

I'm glad if you found this review Helpful.

Title: Another Amazing product by Sennheiser :) !!!!
Comment:
Sennheiser is one of the best among headphone brands. Talking about these headphones they're, awesome for it's price range. You can grab it for around 800 bucks and even less on e-commerce websites. Let me break it down in pointers, so that you can be the judge whether this one's for you or not.
The design is elegant and catchy. While it comes in only colour combination i.e, Black & Grey, it is pretty good. The edge of the earpieces are curved which makes it ergonomical to hold with your fingers. if you down you even get cable holder which helps in adjusting the length of wire. While wires are normal even after about 9 months of usage I do not see any wearing and tearing signs. The 2.5 mm jack is gold plated which adds to the durability the sound output. These earphones are very light(5 gram).
While there may be complaints regarding it's bass, bear in mind that this comes on a budget range compared to bass heavy products. For it's price, the sound from these earphones are clear and balanced. Yeah, maybe it is not bass heavy but if you want so then you should be looking in more premium range. Vocals are pretty good and mids are also even good. These earphones can get amazingly loud and I bet that at maximum volume you would throw out the earphones in matter of minutes. For me 60% is the sweet spot. Also the noise isolation is damn good. Even in heavy traffics and noises it amazingly isolates the noises. So, there, s a good chance you would not be able hear the horns and sounds of approaching vehicle, so while wearing it keep your eyes alert!
This earphone has no mic in it. So, if you want an earphone with a mic then I would suggest JBL T100A or JBL C100SI. But if you are looking for a earphone for good music in a budget then go for this one.
These earphones come with a warranty of two years which is amazing deal at this price point.But as these earphones are not braided you would have to be careful because wires are not that sturdy.
P.S:- Around 2 days back, these earphones were in my jeans which were soaked in detergent for about 10 hours. This was dumb of me but these earphones are still working the same and there are no problems even after being in water for so long.

This is it my friends. I guess this would give you pretty much reasons to sort out your requirement and confusions to get your hands on this earphone. I am very happy with the product keeping in mind the price I paid for it.

Title: Bang for the buck!
Comment:
I brought this product last year and is using it on a daily basis. It's robust, good looking and portable. By analyzing any E commerce site you can see the CX180 ranked top among other headsets. The main reason behind is the brand value and the performance of the product. This model has been on the market for quiet a long time and have lots of users by now.

The design comprises the bud and wire black in color and the head part is given a ash color. The pin is 3.5mm and is compatible with any samrtphones or other gadgets in the market and also the upcoming ones. The main attraction about this headset is the balance between the base and the treble. The base is not killing the treble, which is the main defect seen in most of the headsets in this price range, But not on CX180.

The packaging is good and is consist of the headset along with the 3 pair of earbuds. The choosing of earbuds is crucial. The best fit for your ears will give the best base and treble range. The headset doesn't comes with a mic, but it's not an issue for me because I use this mainly for listening to music rather than calling.

The headset doesn't comes with noise cancellation but with noise isolation. You can here a small static noise while the music ends and next track begins. But it won't come while the song is playing. Also the wire of the headset is not anti tangle type which is a let down. Because it gets tangled a lot. Apart from that it is perfect for me.

I purchased this headset for 800 INR and still it is a good deal for me.

Title: Perfect in middle range
Comment:
It's no small achievement being one of the highest selling audio products in India, and the Sennheiser CX180 is just that. It's such a successful model and sells in such huge volumes that Sennheiser actually rations supplies to dealers all over the country. A noted online retailer recently told us that he receives not more than 100 units of the CX180 at the beginning of every month, and these are usually sold out within a week. What is it that makes the CX180 so popular? We find out in our review.

Specifications, design and comfort

The Sennheiser CX180 is an in-ear canalphone-style headset, and has a frequency response range of 20-20, 000Hz. It also has an impedance rating of 16Ohms and a sensitivity of 110dB. The headset does not have an in-line microphone and remote, and has a standard 1.2m cable. The sales package includes three sets of ear-tips in different sizes.

On the design front, the Sennheiser CX180 is simple and functional. Made entirely of plastic, the earphones have a glossy finish on the front and a dull finish on the back, which has been designed in such a way that it's possible to grip each earphone between your finger and thumb for insertion and removal. It's also incredibly light and comfortable, which ensures ease of use over long periods. The only flaw is the cable, which is thin, tangle-prone, and extremely susceptible to cable noise.

Performance

The Sennheiser CX180 is an entry-level headset that is expected to be used primarily with mobile devices. The majority of our testing was done using an Android smartphone, but we also tried it with our reference and a Windows laptop. Focus tracks were Zomboy's Nuclear, Bonobo's Days To Come, and Gotye's State Of The Art.

Title: Worthless...
Comment:
I've had this for over 4 years now. I had bought it blindly because I needed an inexpensive in-ear headphone, and had previously positive experiences with it. This one - flat out disappointing. Mids are over-boosted and it gets screechy when I'm watching movies. Bass is lack-luster(yes, I've tried alternate buds), and highs are not especially pleasant either. The stock earphones you get with cellphones these days(Samsungs, Sony, HTC) are all much much better balanced than these. Quality is solid though, so while some excellent sounding Philips in-ears("sports edition" meant to be rugged and waterproof) died out with a year, this continues, to my annoyance, to tick on. I primarily use it now to listen to podcasts when I'm running, where the mid-range boost actually helps. But for music and general use, a very annoying experience.

Pros: Well-built, can get decent volume out of them

Cons: Terrible sound, expensive for what they deliver

Bottom-line: No

Title: Sennheiser CX 180 Street II In Ear Earphones
Comment:
Product Description

Sennheiser CX 180 Street II In-Ear Headphone

Comfortable and Sturdy

The ideal companion to all your audio devices is here. With comfortable fit and sturdy design the Sennheiser CX 180 Street II In-Ear Headphone, fits perfectly with all your audio gadgets with its 3.5mm stereo mini plug and give you the acoustics to your music like never before. It comes with a set of different sized ear caps so you can use the one that fits your ear best and does not let the Earphone slide off. The sturdy cable is 1.2 m long that gives you enough space between you and your device. It has a finger contoured housing design that gives it a sleek look and easy adjustment for comfortable wear. Carry it wherever you want, while travelling, shopping or maybe for a walk, the CX 180 is the perfect companion to your audio device.

Powerful Sound Quality

The Sennheiser CX 180 has been engineered with Bass-driven Stereo sound technology that gives impressive and deep bass. The technologically advanced design of the earphone reduces the peripheral noise to ensure you stay entertained without any interference of external noises. It is equipped with 16 ohms impedance, 20 Hz to 20, 000 Hz frequency response and 110dB sound pressure level. Be it your smartphone, tablet, MP3 player or any other device just plug in the Sennheiser CX 180 Street II In-Ear Headphone for an enriched acoustics experience.

From the Manufacturer

Remarkable Engineering Unified with Ace Sound Quality

A marvel of sophisticated headphone engineering and superior sound solutions, Sennheiser CX 180 Street II in-ear headphone is an absolute must-have accessory for people who are fond of music. With a built-in capability of delivering a powerful bass-driven stereo sound, the Sennheiser CX 180 Street II is the perfect gadget that lets you enjoy an uncompromising music listening session. Keeping in mind the wearing comfort of the listeners, the makers have incorporated a finger contoured housing design that makes it easy to adjust and gives it a stylish appearance as well.

Cancels Unwanted Noise

The last thing that you want to bother about during your music listening session is the noise pollution that comes in from external ambience. This Sennheiser CX 180 headphone helps you do exactly this with its technically superior features that include relatively higher headphone sensitivity of 16 Ohms. With its perfect in-ear–canalphone design coupled with the excellent noise attenuating ability, the Sennheiser in ear headphone ensures that the ambient noise does not interrupt your listening experience. Additionally, these headphones are portable as well as lightweight making them easy to carry around even in your pocket.

Type: Wired in-the-ear headphone

Colour: Silver

Design: In-ear-canalphone

Powerful sound reproduction and impeccable bass response

Eliminates background noise

Frequency Response: 18 to 20, 000 Hz

Impedance: 16 Ohms

Title: Good but not the best for the price..!
Comment:
After searching for a lot on the web, I finally found Something that Suits my needs and doesn't break my bang obviously, price is the most important factor atleast for me! , as iam not an audiophile to pay a lot on headphones but this video might just help you in getting one of the better Headphones available in the market! , And So this is my full review of the Sennheiser CX 180.!

If you want to have even indepth look at the Headphones then do check our full video review.! https: //youtu.be/4USYJ4YObRA

So let's Start with the Build and Surprisingly these are built quite Steardy and they Actually do a pretty good job in being Tangle free, obviously these are Not 100% anti Tangle due to their plastic and rubber construction, but once you start using them you will come to know what iam tryina say! Moving on, there has been taken care of little things which show us the companies attention to detail when designing the Headphones such as the rubber that surrounds the tip of the wires to not let them break easily, and the Left and Right caps are nicely named and the Sennheiser branding can be found everywhere from the top to the bottom and talking about bottom the 3.5MM Headphone Jack is Gold plated which helps in better Sound quality and speaking about Sound quality here is where the CX 180 shines, I bet these can easily outperform any Headphones that are priced twice or even thrice and these are the loudest I have ever listened and I am there will be only 5% people who can keep these headphones at 90% volume and it's not just about sound alone the Bass is striking and I can hear the every minute detail and what's going in the music and literally for a person like me! who is not an audiophile these Headphones had to do a very little to impress me! and speaking about impressing me I was astonishingly surprised by the way the Noise cancellation works! I mean I have no words to applaud the way the Noise cancellation works.! , and this makes these 'GO TO' Headphones for everyone who travels a lot! as these will Not disappoint you in audio quality But! And Yes! I said but, as is the case with every headphone these aren't perfect, as there is No microphone so those who want to use these headphones for stand alone calling, you will be disappointed and there is no Switch for changing the tracks or changing the volume and these reasons might very well be a deal breaker for many but on the flip side those who want to use these headphones for listening music or watching movies or while playing games, these Headphones can't be overlooked! And for just the price of about 10$ or 700/-INR these are Still certainly a better pair of Headphones available in the market considering these headphones come with 2 years of Manufacturer warranty, but! These are not the best Headphones and if microphone in a headphone is must, Go instead for the popular JBL T150A for around the same price.!

Title: Crank the bass on these comfy in-ears

Title: Great bass, affordable in-ear earphone
Comment:
Recently I purchased this earphone from Amazon and I'm thoroughly satisifed with the product. The seller Cloudtail delivered it timely. I researched a lot about earphones before buying and fixed onto this. The Sony earphones with extra bass are quite expensive, the Skullcandy ones do not last long and so  Sennheiser being a reputed brand I took this. This is the best-selling earphone under Rs. 1000. I will now discuss what I liked about this:
Sound quality - First and foremost, the sound quality is amazing. It's very crisp and bass is ok too. The highs and mids are clear and can hear every beat. With proper equalizer this can be a beast. Anyways, the lows can be managed as they can't be crystal clear on an expensive one too.
2.Comfort - The earphone looks to be durable and last for a long time. Yes, the wire is thin but coming from a well established brand it will not wear easily.
Packaging - The box was well packed and you will find the earphones along with changeable earbuds. The box may not be as stylish like that of the Sony ones but quite decently it is packed.
Price - Under Rs. 1000 it's a deal because you get a complete package with good branded earphones and crisp sound that will shake your soul. If you are bass-head then you can go for Sony MDR-XB30EX else this one's perfect for you. Overall, I am loving music on this earphone and been over 3 months with no issues.

Title: Amazing Bass, Great Product
Comment:
I have been using Sennheiser CX 180 earphones for over six months now with my MI 4I phones.  Being an ardent music lover, I purchased this awesome product after reading a lot of reviews on it in different web portals.

The price of this product is MRP 990/- with some eCommerce sites offering it a discounted price. It is a German company product and comes with a two year warranty.  I got it at the full MRP price at a Reliance Digital outlet near my house at Attapur, Hyderabad.  I have not been disappointed with the quality of its performance.  It is simply an amazing sound output device. It works well with any audio device which has a 3.5 mm earphone facility.

The quality of music from this earphone is excellent, good bass, good balance of all bass, treble, and highs, mids and lows.  It is too good and it will certainly satisfy you for its worth.

It is a purely music set of earphones, and does not have a built in mic in it, though you can hear the calls from it and you can use the mic of the phone for speaking in.

It is the best earphones you can get for a budget of less than Rs 1000/-.  The two year warranty is an added assurance of its quality and Sennheiser assures to replace it with no questions asked during the warranty period except for reasons of physical damage due to mishandling.

Go for it if you are looking for a good pair of earphones for the purpose of listening to music of good quality.  You will not regret it.

It doesn't have any microphone or in-line remote.

Coming to the quality, the build is nice, durable.

Although these are bass-driven earphones, the bass is not so good.

You will completely find out the difference when compare it with Creative ep630.

But the sound quality is good, balanced.

Recently there has been a price drop. It was sold for 1599 earlier but if you check this price online you will get it anywhere around 799-1099.

It comes in with a 2 years of warranty.

These are nice earphones. You won't regret buying one.

Title: Best ear phones under 1000 Rs.
Comment:
Sennheiser CX 180 Street-II is the best pick under Rs 1000 price category due to its crystal quality sound, thumping deep bass, comfort ability, quality wire and Fantastic ambient noise attenuation.

Sound Quality: 10/10

Durability: 10/10

Bass: 10/10

Noise Reduction: 09/10

Sennheiser CX 180 Street II In-Ear Headphone is a sensational feat of headphone engineering, with its stunning design, quality and comfortable fit. It suits almost everyone and is the best In-Ear head phone available in the Indian market. It is meant for extended use and designed to make you enjoy the mind-blowing bass effects with its bass-driven stereo output. Sennheiser CX 180 II is an inner ear headphone which is meant to cancel all those annoying background noise during musical appreciation with its perfect fit.

CX180 is the best headphone out there under Rs 1000 and it is suitable for almost all occasions like work out sessions, joggings, gaming etc. due to its wire quality(long and strong), light weight and portability. Title: Great balaced audio but a minor defect.
Comment:
Pros:-
Great balanced audio experience. Sennheiser products always produces a balanced audio. Even the big brands like sony, always messes up with the bass by increasing it. Some people likes that extra bass provided by the sony earphones but for me, the true audio which is intended by the music creator is the best experience.
Thumbs up for this awesome noise cancellation. It just isolates the ambient noise around you with greater extent. The end results just provide you with greater experience for music listening.
2 years warranty. No brand provides 2 years of warranty for their earphones at this time. This really just shows the confidence of the brand in their product.
It comes with 3 set of silicon ear plugs of different sizes. This is something which in my opinion should come with every in ear earphones in the market. Every person have different size of ear canals and the same ear plug will not fit for everyone. For me, it's the smallest ear plugs.
Cons:-
If the wires move around, you can hear that noise every time the wire moves. This is some times frustrating and intolerable. It bothers me a lot and this is something sennheiser should fix in the next iteration of these earphones.
